title: Tunisian Date Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert inspired by Tunisian cuisine, made with fresh dates and a crispy oat topping.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the oats, brown sugar, and coconut oil. Mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the crispy oat topping and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, arrange the pitted dates in a single layer.
Spoon the oat mixture evenly over the dates.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Drizzle with vanilla extract before serving.
